hooks.description: Bootstrap: verify settings.local, CLAUDE.md size, skill staleness, doc line counts, pending migrations, active sprint

hooks.command: node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');try{const c=JSON.parse(d)?.tool_input?.command||'';if(/(?:&&|;)\s*git\s+(commit|push)/.test(c)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Chain guard: split git add and git commit into separate Bash calls so lint/typecheck hooks fire.'})+' ');process.exit(2)}}catch{}"
hooks.description: Block git add && git commit/push chains — force two Bash calls so Bash(git commit*) lint hook fires
